title: Unable to pull image with podman desktop
body:
### Issue Description

Unable to pull docker image from podman desktop. Receiving error is : "Error while pulling image from Podman Machine: no running provider for the matching container"  

podman version
_Client:       Podman Engine
Version:      4.9.2
API Version:  4.9.2
Go Version:   go1.21.6_

podman info

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. Open podman desktop
2. Go to images section
3. Pull image
4. Enter image name, ex: "redis"
5. Press "Pull image"


### Describe the results you received

![image](https://github.com/containers/podman/assets/117661610/013de81a-3356-4a2a-9d50-afc84fa5949c)
Receiving error is : "Error while pulling image from Podman Machine: no running provider for the matching container"  

### Describe the results you expected

Image is pulled successfully and I should be able to create a container out of it with Podman.

### podman info output

```yaml
If you are unable to run podman info for any reason, please provide the podman version, operating system and its version and the architecture you are running.
```


### Podman in a container

No

### Privileged Or Rootless

None

### Upstream Latest Release

Yes

### Additional environment details

Additional environment details

### Additional information

comments.body: Podman desktop issues need to be reported there: https://github.com/containers/podman-desktop/
